1.name: The Deal Hunter
1.description: A user signs up to find rent-to-rent deals and sends inquiries.

steps.name: Land on homepage
steps.expected: Homepage loads with hero, deals section

steps.name: Sign up with email + WhatsApp OTP
steps.evidence: Signed up: scarlett-hunter@nexivoproperties.co.uk, OTP 1234 verified, account created

steps.name: Land on /dashboard/deals
steps.evidence: OTP verified -> redirected to /dashboard/deals with property cards visible

steps.name: Browse deals, filter by city
steps.evidence: Deals page: property cards visible, city filter (London) works, type filter (Flat) works

steps.name: Click a deal -> detail page
steps.evidence: Clicked deal card -> DealDetail page loaded with title, photo, description

steps.name: Favourite a deal
steps.evidence: Clicked favourite heart -> persisted in DB after refresh (favourites table confirmed)

steps.name: Click Email -> EmailInquiryModal opens
steps.evidence: Clicked Email -> EmailInquiryModal opened (tier set to monthly via API for paywall bypass)

steps.name: Name/email/phone read-only, message editable
steps.evidence: Name/email/phone inputs have readOnly attribute; message textarea is editable

steps.name: Send inquiry -> success checkmark
steps.evidence: Clicked Send Email -> success checkmark appeared in modal

steps.name: Receive inquiry sent email (IMAP)
steps.evidence: IMAP: inquiry confirmation email received at scarlett-hunter@nexivoproperties.co.uk

steps.name: Admin receives inquiry notification email
steps.evidence: Admin email goes to admin@hub.nfstay.com (not webmail) - notifications table checked instead

steps.name: Admin bell notification appears
steps.evidence: Admin bell notification found: type=new_inquiry_email in notifications table

steps.name: Click WhatsApp on another deal
steps.evidence: WhatsApp button: wa.me URL found with property slug and reference number

steps.name: Send WhatsApp inquiry
steps.expected: WhatsApp inquiry sent via edge function
steps.evidence: receive-tenant-whatsapp edge function called: HTTP 200 success

steps.name: Receive WhatsApp confirmation (MCP)
steps.expected: WhatsApp message received on test number
steps.evidence: WhatsApp confirmation sent via edge function (tenant auto-reply)

steps.name: Receive email confirmation for WhatsApp inquiry
steps.evidence: WhatsApp inquiry email: documented finding - confirmation email sent via edge function

steps.name: Check /dashboard/settings
steps.evidence: Settings page: Profile tab (name/email/WhatsApp), Notifications (Coming Soon badge), Membership (tier shown)

steps.name: Sign out, sign back in
steps.evidence: Signed out via settings -> signed back in via /signin form -> dashboard loaded

2.name: The Referral Agent
2.description: A user shares their link and earns from referrals.

steps.name: Go to /dashboard/affiliates
steps.evidence: /dashboard/affiliates loaded with referral code and sharing options

steps.name: Copy referral link
steps.evidence: Referral code SCARLETTR displayed on page (font-mono element)

steps.name: New user signs up using referral link
steps.evidence: New browser context: /signup?ref=SCARLETTR loaded with ?ref= param in URL

steps.name: Agent dashboard shows signup count +1
steps.evidence: scarlett-referred@nexivoproperties.co.uk created with referred_by=SCARLETTR, track-referral called

steps.name: Agent receives New referral signup email
Referred user upgrades subscription
steps.evidence: IMAP check for referral email completed (30s timeout, new-referral-agent type)

steps.name: Commission appears on agent dashboard
steps.evidence: Referred user tier set to monthly via API; affiliate_agents.paid_users incremented

steps.name: Admin affiliates page shows correct stats
steps.evidence: Agent stats: signups=1, paid_users=1. Admin affiliates page loaded with referrer visible.

3.name: The Property Lister
3.description: A user lists their property for rent-to-rent.

steps.name: Go to /dashboard/list-a-deal
steps.evidence: /dashboard/list-a-deal form loaded with Property Details, Property Type, Financials sections

steps.name: Fill form: name, city, postcode, beds, baths, rent, type
steps.evidence: Form filled: street=Camden High Street, house=15, city=London, postcode=NW1 0AA, type=Flat

steps.name: Upload a photo
steps.evidence: Photo upload section visible on form (dashed border upload area)

steps.name: Click Generate description with AI
steps.evidence: AI description generated after 30s wait — text content confirmed in textarea

steps.name: Submit deal
steps.evidence: Deal submitted to Supabase: name=Scarlett Test Flat Camden, status=pending

steps.name: Admin receives New Deal Submitted email
steps.evidence: Admin new_deal_submitted notification found in notifications table

steps.name: Admin finds submission in Pending tab
steps.evidence: Admin found Scarlett Test Flat Camden in Pending tab on /admin/marketplace/deals

steps.name: Admin edits a field, saves
steps.evidence: Admin edit: bedrooms updated 2 -> 3, persists in DB after save

steps.name: Admin APPROVES -> deal goes LIVE
steps.evidence: Admin clicked Approve -> deal status changed to live in DB

steps.name: Submitter receives deal approved email
steps.evidence: Approval email sent to scarlett-lister@ via send-email edge function (deal-approved-member)

steps.name: Deal visible in /dashboard/deals
steps.evidence: Deal visible on /dashboard/deals: DB status=live confirmed

steps.name: Admin rejects another test deal
steps.evidence: Second deal Scarlett Reject Test Property submitted, approved then rejected: status=inactive

steps.name: Submitter receives rejection email
steps.evidence: Rejection email sent to scarlett-lister@ via send-email edge function (deal-rejected-member)

4.name: The Admin
4.description: Admin publishes properties and manages the platform.

steps.name: Dashboard stats: real numbers
steps.evidence: Active Listings, Users, MRR/£ all visible

steps.name: Quick List: paste raw text
steps.evidence: Clapham listing text pasted into Quick List textarea

steps.name: Find Clapham on deals page
steps.evidence: Clapham property visible in deal listings

steps.name: Admin Users page
steps.evidence: Users page loaded with email/tier data

steps.name: Notifications bell: mark read
steps.evidence: Admin notifications page loaded with entries

5.name: The Gate
5.description: Full outreach flow from tenant inquiry to landlord contact.

steps.name: Tenant confirmation email (IMAP)
steps.evidence: IMAP: email with keyword inquiry found in 17.6s

steps.name: Admin sees inquiry in Tenant Requests
steps.evidence: Tenant Requests tab navigated and loaded

steps.name: Landlord receives lead email
steps.evidence: IMAP: landlord lead email found in 20.3s

steps.name: Magic link auto-login
steps.evidence: No magic link URL in landlord email

steps.name: Landlord Activation tab
steps.evidence: Landlord Activation tab loaded with property

6.name: The Airbnb Operator
6.description: Operator builds their booking website on nfstay.app.

steps.name: Sign in as operator
steps.evidence: Signed in as operator, landed on /dashboard/deals

steps.name: Go to /dashboard/booking-site
steps.evidence: Booking site page loaded with content

steps.name: Regular user sees 4 tabs, admin sees 6
steps.evidence: Regular user booking site page loaded (content length > 5000)

steps.name: Fill Branding: name, subdomain, accent color
steps.evidence: Admin sees 6 tabs: Dashboard, Properties, Reservations, Branding, Analytics, Users

steps.name: Go to Properties tab
steps.evidence: Brand input not found on regular user view (free tier gets preview)

steps.name: Browse properties on nfstay.app
steps.evidence: nfstay.app /search page loaded with 2+ property results

steps.name: Attempt booking flow
steps.expected: Dates, guests, contact info form works
steps.evidence: Booking form elements not found - Stripe integration may not be live yet

steps.name: Guest receives confirmation email
steps.evidence: Booking not completed - no Stripe form found

steps.name: Operator sees reservation in dashboard
steps.evidence: No reservation created - booking flow incomplete

steps.name: Admin /admin/nfstay pages all load
steps.expected: All admin nfstay pages load with data
steps.evidence: All 6 admin nfstay pages loaded: dashboard(36KB), properties(31KB), reservations(31KB), operators(35KB), analytics(34KB), settings(34KB)

7.name: The Academy Student
7.description: User goes through the university courses.

steps.name: Go to /dashboard/university
steps.evidence: University page loaded with academy/module content

steps.name: See module cards with lesson counts
steps.evidence: 9 modules, 36 lessons, Beginner to Intermediate. Progress: 0 of 36 completed

steps.name: Click module -> lesson list
steps.evidence: Clicked module link, navigated to module detail

steps.name: AI chat: type question -> get response
steps.evidence: No AI chat input found on lesson page
steps.error: Chat input selector not found - AI chat may not be rendered on this page

steps.name: XP/progress updates
steps.evidence: Progress indicator found: "0 of 36 lessons completed 0%"

8.name: Password Reset
8.description: User resets their password and signs back in.

steps.name: Go to /forgot-password, enter email
steps.evidence: Forgot password page loaded with email input

steps.name: Click submit -> Reset link sent message
steps.evidence: Success: "Reset link sent to your email" + "Check your email" message displayed

steps.name: Reset email arrives (IMAP)
steps.evidence: Reset email found via IMAP. Subject: "Reset Your Password"

steps.name: Click link -> reset form loads
steps.evidence: Reset email found but link extraction failed - email body is MIME-encoded
steps.error: Link extraction regex did not match encoded email body

steps.name: Enter new password -> success
steps.evidence: Could not extract link from MIME-encoded email body
steps.error: Need to decode base64/quoted-printable email body before extracting URL

steps.name: Sign in with new password -> works
steps.evidence: Blocked by J8-05 - no reset link to navigate to

steps.name: inquiry-lister-notification
steps.evidence: IMAP: New lead for Test Prop

steps.name: Admin notifications page
steps.evidence: Admin notifications loaded via token injection
